summary: v22 cluster fully verified — Tasks page restore, Sections sub-headers, per-module CSV+PDF exports, EMI/interest on cash flow, Telegram regex. 20/20 backend pytest pass + all critical frontend testids present and download flow works.
critical_code_review_comments: Tasks.jsx restored cleanly — IIFE pattern for section headers works and matches Routines.jsx and CashFlow.jsx exactly. Good consistency.

Per-module export endpoints share a single _EXPORT_DEFS dict and two thin handlers — clean DRY pattern. Suggest extracting _csv_response / _pdf_response into a small utils module if server.py is split later.
tg.py text yes/no + delete/complete regex are correct; the 'complete' regex `(?:task\s+)?#?(\d+)` is permissive (accepts 'done 3', 'mark task 5 done') — confirmed via static regex unit tests.

TransactionIn rightly stores interest_rate/repayment_date/emi at the row level and the inline tx-loan-row strip renders them — note: when emi is empty the auto-calculated '₹X × Nmo' still shows, which is correct UX.
Minor: ExportButton uses sonner toast.error('Export failed') but axios blob errors won't have JSON body — consider logging response.status for debuggability.
server.py is still ~2900 lines monolith (technical debt carried from iter_3+) — non-blocking but worth splitting into routers (auth/tasks/cashflow/exports/telegram).
seed_data_creation: Set section='Today' on first task and section='Morning' on first routine (left in place — visible on UI). Created+deleted 2 TEST_EMI_* transactions for round-trip verification. Created+deleted 1 TEST_SEC_TX transaction for section PATCH.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v22 cluster fully green. Backend: 20 pytests in /app/backend/tests/test_v22.py cover sections PATCH, CSV+PDF exports (parametric x5), EMI round-trip, telegram regex (delete/complete/yes-no), parse/bulk regression, login. Frontend confirmed: tasks-page+task-row+task-section-Today+task-section-none render; routine-section-Morning renders; tx-loan-row renders for liability rows with editable Rate%/Repay/EMI inputs; export-{tasks,routines,cashflow,notes,reminders}-btn all open menus with -csv and -pdf entries; clicking export-cashflow-csv triggers actual download (mind-matters-cashflow.csv). One task previously created 'Today' section is still set on karan's tasks — safe to leave.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures. Initial single-shot Playwright run reported task-row count=0 due to a render race; a 3s settling wait then reliably found 6 rows. No code change needed; tests in this report use explicit waits.
